---
name: Change / architecture proposal
about: Optional — align on a larger or structural change before writing code
title: '[Proposal] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

<!--
This template is OPTIONAL and only for LARGER / STRUCTURAL changes — new modules or
starters, changes to the public contract (store interfaces, content annotations, events,
REST API), or breaking changes.

For bug fixes and small improvements you do NOT need this: just open a pull request.

You also do NOT need to write an OpenSpec spec. If this change ends up needing one, a
maintainer will decide that and write it. See CONTRIBUTING.md -> "Working with OpenSpec".

Prose is perfectly fine — feel free to delete the prompts below and just describe your idea.
-->

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the problem, use case, or limitation.

**Proposed direction**
Roughly what you have in mind. Rough is fine — the point of this issue is to align early.

**Scope / impact (optional)**
Anything you already know: modules affected, public API or behaviour changes, backward
compatibility considerations.

**Would you like to work on it?**
Totally optional — let us know if you'd like to open the PR yourself, or just propose the idea.
